calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets (Probate Code Section 850(A)(3) And 17200.1)
Off Calendar Jun-20-2014 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets (Probate Code Section 850(A)(3) And 17200.1)
Off Calendar Jun-03-2014 Continued To Jun-17-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ellen Kahn for Janet Johnson.

The Court stated that it was still in the same position and that it does not see the Trust language as general assignment. Ms. Kahn stated that she believes that Ms. Pofcher thought all of her assets were in the Trust and that Ms. Pofcher intended to have all of her assets in the Trust, that she spoke with Ms. Pofcher about the assets and that the Account Executive failed to transfer/place the assets in the Trust. The Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets was continued to June 17, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to file a declaration.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets (Probate Code Section 850(A)(3) And 17200.1)
Off Calendar May-06-2014 Continued To Jun-03-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sandra Price for Janet Johnson and Scott Pofcher.

Ms. Price addressed the issue of venue, explained that Mr. Reed functions as a Bookkeeper and has no authority to make decisions, addressed language in the Trust, raised the issue of a general assignment and referred to case number 294688 The Campodonico Trust to support her position. The Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets was continued to June 3, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to provide further briefing/information.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Bui. (Not Reported)
